name: CZ75自动型 | 做旧手艺
descriptionEn: A fully automatic variant of the CZ75, the CZ75-Auto is the ideal short-term choice for turning the tables and gaining your opponents weapon. But with very little ammo in the magazine, strong trigger discipline is required. The copper colored ceramic finish is wearing away with use. Better with age
descriptionZh: 一把全自动的 CZ75 手枪变种，在扭转局势以及获取敌人武器时，CZ75 自动手枪是一个短期的理想选择。但弹夹中的弹药极少，你需要节约每一发子弹。 这件铜色陶瓷饰品随着使用逐渐磨损。 历久弥新
